spec_match.rationale: Uses beforetoggle with event.preventDefault() to intercept close — exactly the spec's cancellable surface.

interactive.rationale: Multi-step wizard with mid-flow close interception, resume / abandon choice. Real product flow.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises wizard with intercept-on-close + resume/abandon — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show how preventDefault interacts with ESC key (ESC bypasses Dialog's beforetoggle in some browsers — worth confirming). Doesn't show what happens if the wizard internally calls .close() programmatically.

openQuestions.title: Probe ESC-key handling
openQuestions.detail: ESC on a showModal() dialog fires the cancel event then beforetoggle. preventDefault on cancel SHOULD keep it open but historical browser quirks exist. Add a 'press ESC' button equivalent so the visitor sees the behaviour clearly.

openQuestions.title: Show programmatic .close() interaction
openQuestions.detail: When code calls dialog.close() directly, beforetoggle still fires. Add a 'force close' button that calls close() and watch the interceptor kick in.

summary: Solid wizard demo of the cancellable beforetoggle event. Could probe ESC-key and programmatic close edge cases.
